title: echioides fimbriopetalum

parts: Echioides fimbriopetalum has many medicinal parts, such as the roots, which contain constituents like flavonoids and phenolic acids, and are used to treat fever and rheumatism. side_effects: Echioides fimbriopetalum can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea and vomiting, due to its toxic alkaloids. Prolonged use or excessive consumption of the plant may lead to kidney damage and failure, as well as liver toxicity. In some cases, Echioides fimbriopetalum may cause allergic reactions, resulting in skin rashes, hives, and itching. It's essential to consult a medical professional before using the plant for medicinal purposes to avoid these potential side effects.
